course_title: PROFESSIONAL SKILLS IN ENERGY ANALYSIS AND POLICY
description: Discussion of professional skills important to interdisciplinary professionals in energy analysis and policy. Exploration of diverse career pathways and personal career development goals. Includes presentations from practitioners in public, private, and non-profit sectors.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the Energy Analysis and Policy graduate/professional certificate

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Declared in the Energy Analysis and Policy graduate/professional certificate
